diagrams.title: AWS Global Infrastructure
diagrams.description: Shows the worldwide physical structure of AWS including Regions, Availability Zones, and Edge Locations, demonstrating how AWS delivers low-latency services globally
diagrams.purpose: Explains how AWS achieves high availability and low latency through its distributed global infrastructure

diagrams.title: AWS Shared Responsibility Model
diagrams.description: Illustrates the division of security responsibilities between AWS and the customer, showing what AWS manages versus what the customer must secure
elements: AWS-managed items: physical infrastructure, networking, hypervisor
Customer-managed items: data, applications, access management, OS
diagrams.purpose: Clarifies security accountability and helps users understand their role in securing cloud resources

diagrams.title: AWS Well-Architected Framework Pillars
diagrams.description: Displays the six pillars of AWS best practices for designing reliable, secure, efficient, and cost-effective cloud architectures
diagrams.purpose: Provides a framework for evaluating and improving cloud architectures based on AWS best practices
